mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL is still running above the prior 3-month trend and FEDFUNDS remains near zero, markets price a faster future policy normalization and higher term premium, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield up over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: early inflation pickup with policy still accommodative
failure_condition: Rejected if CPIAUCSL acceleration and low FEDFUNDS do not coincide with higher 10-year yield changes in triggered periods, or if the sign is negative in more than 60% of such 20-day windows.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE crossing above its recent 3-month average signals labor-market deterioration, increasing duration demand and recession hedging, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises at least 0.2pp above its 3-month moving average
failure_condition: Rejected if UNRATE threshold crossings are followed by positive or flat 20-day yield changes in a majority of cases, or if the average post-trigger yield change is not negative.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS and PAYEMS both improve together, the combination signals stronger nominal spending and hiring momentum, leading investors to expect firmer growth and higher Treasury yields over the next month.
regime_hint: broad expansion with improving nominal demand
failure_condition: Rejected if joint RSAFS-PAYEMS strength fails to predict higher 20-day yields, or if either series alone explains the sign and the interaction adds no incremental directional power.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained rise in INDPRO above its recent 6-month path indicates stronger real activity and tighter future capacity, which raises expected real rates and pushes the 10-year Treasury yield higher over a 60-day horizon.
failure_condition: Rejected if INDPRO uptrends are followed by declining or unchanged 10-year yields over 60 trading days more often than not, or if the rolling 3-year directional accuracy drops below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: A collapse in HOUST below its prior 3-month average signals housing weakness and broader domestic demand softening, which lifts safe-haven demand for Treasuries and lowers the 10-year yield over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below its 3-month moving average by more than 5%
failure_condition: Rejected if HOUST downside breaks are not followed by lower 20-day yields, or if the sign turns positive in a majority of threshold-crossing episodes.

mechanism_narrative: The combination of rising CPIAUCSL and an unchanged FEDFUNDS rate implies real policy rates are falling behind inflation, steepening the expected path of short rates and lifting the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL is rising while FEDFUNDS is unchanged for 2 consecutive monthly observations
failure_condition: Rejected if the joint inflation-and-policy-lag condition does not precede higher 5-day yields, or if yield increases occur equally often when only one leg of the interaction is present.

mechanism_narrative: In a post-tightening labor slowdown, a falling PAYEMS growth rate with UNRATE rising above 4.5% signals weakening income and spending power, which lowers the 10-year Treasury yield over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE > 4.5% and PAYEMS growth is negative versus 6 months earlier
failure_condition: Rejected if the combined labor-softening condition fails to produce lower 60-day yields, or if the interaction term is not stronger than either series alone in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: In an already weak-demand environment, falling GDPC1 and soft RSAFS together confirm aggregate spending deterioration, increasing recession odds and driving the 10-year Treasury yield lower over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDP is negative on the latest quarterly print and RSAFS is below its 6-month average
failure_condition: Rejected if simultaneous GDP and retail-sales weakness does not precede lower 20-day yields, or if the signal disappears once either proxy is removed.
